id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-38" value="<span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">SYN = 1</span><br style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;"><span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">seq = x</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-40" y="68.5" width="90" height="47" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-39" value="<span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">SYN = ACK = 1</span><div><span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">seq = y</span></div><div><span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">ack = x+1</span></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-50" y="163" width="110" height="65.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-41" value="<span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">ACK = 1</span><div><span style="font-size: 14px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">ack = y+1</span></div>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-40" y="283" width="90" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-42" value="<span style="font-size: 15px; text-wrap-mode: nowrap;">LISTEN</span>" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="85.5" width="150" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-43" value="<span style="font-size: 14px;">调用 listen</span>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="38.75" width="100" height="37.25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ul33xMG0bIRqs8SZj3Mw-44" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="360.00000000000006" y="38.75" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="75.37" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> x="360.00000000000006" y="126.13" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="360" y="179.75" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
